statement: In every magma, Equation 550 (`x = y * (z * (x * (w * y)))`) implies Equation 2965 (`x = ((y * (y * z)) * z) * y`).
lean_statement:
theorem problem_normal_0899
    {G : Type*} (op : G → G → G)
    (h : ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op y (op z (op x (op w y))))) :
    ∀ x y z w : G, x = (op (op (op y (op y z)) z) y)
